name: SPY RUMBLE
short_description: Kill the spy who has blended in! Up to 8 players battle royale imposter
detailed_description:
Update Notes

2023/04/22 New item "Killer Badge" and third camp "Killer".
2023/02/21 New map "Secret Lab" has been implemented.
2022/08/27 New mode "Hunting" was implemented
2022/08/27 Zombie Pirates Shima skin was implemented
2022/07/03 Text chat feature implemented
2022/06/25 Open Room Match function implemented


About the Game

Welcome to the crazy battle royale imposter stage!

Among the agents gathered on this stage, you will find a spy who is plotting to assassinate you.

If you find a spy, you must either put a lead ball from your gun in his head or persuade the others to expel him.

Of course, be aware that your own back is always being watched. If you're just scared, you're easy prey!

If you don't want to get yourself killed, you can have fun killing the spies that have slipped through the cracks!

Number of players: 4-8

This game is an identity concealment style, in which the player is divided into two cliques, the agent team and the spy team, and take action to achieve the respective victory conditions.

Available for multiple players with voice chat function in-game. (Using voice chat is recommended).

-Agents-.

The agents are imposed to transfer the coins they have earned, fill up the helicopter with fuel and escape, or find and get rid of the spies who are hiding in the team.

If you see anyone suspicious, call a meeting!

-Spies-

The mission of the spies is to eliminate all the agents. To achieve this, pretending to be an agent, obtain and use the items and weapons from the spy armoury or use the spy gadgets that you equip with you for the mission.

Spy gadgets are secret weapons dedicated for spies that can be equipped in for the mission.

You can use it as many times as you want by purchasing it in the store.

Transceiver can be purchased at the store, that can host a meeting to start discussion.

You can get a player to expulsion at the meeting, by voting someone you think is suspicious.

One player, one vote.

Third camp -Killer-

Agents can change into the third camp Killer by meeting certain conditions and purchasing the “Killer Badge”, an item that becomes available in the store.

The Killer's goal is to eliminate all players except himself, and once he becomes a Killer, he will be able to use the Spy Shop.

Hunting Mode

Hunting Mode is a more combat-oriented mode than the regular game mode.

The victory condition is quite simple: victory is achieved by annihilating the enemy camp!

Spies have fewer people and can use exclusive weapons and skills.

Agents win not only by defeating their opponents, but also by escaping from the helicopter by transferring coins.

Voice chat is available for all allied teams regardless of distance, so you can work together to hunt down the enemy team!

supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
